title: Optimize labels as final `if` block statement

features.name: virtual function with return as final if-block statement
features.description: Code should include a virtual function with a return statement that is the final statement in an if block, followed by other code

features.name: type-parameterized class with virtual function
features.description: Code should include a class with a type parameter that has a virtual function returning a bit

features.name: return statement inside conditional expression in function
features.description: Code should include a function returning a bit where the return occurs inside a conditional AND expression within the if statement
